next_step: 继续验证这些 tree-specific 差异是否能在更稳窗口上转化为稳定收益。
note: dynamic_hlb_period_ms_compare_windows_full5 的 JS=0.000000、unique_rows=1.0；dynamic_hlb_tree_query_full5 出现非零 JS，且 unique_rows 接近 eligible 样本数。
summary: period_ms_compare_windows 在注意力分析里几乎没有样本差异，tree_query 则出现明确的 tree-specific 差异，因此 period_ms_tree_query 比纯 period_ms 更适合作为当前主线。
title: tree_query 存在 tree-specific 注意力差异

next_step: 后续比较 tree_query 与非 tree-query 时，要控制静态特征使用方式，估计边际收益。
summary: 对静态树特征做 shuffle 后，tree_query 在多个窗口的 Ctd 明显下降，说明模型确实在使用树相关静态信息，而不是只看共享环境历史。
title: static shuffle 会削弱 tree_query 表现

summary: period_ms should be presented as an independent methodological contribution rather than only background for period_ms_tree_query.
title: Finding: period_ms should be presented as an independent methodological contribution rath

summary: period_ms_tree_query strengthens period_ms by letting static tree features participate in historical period selection.
title: Finding: period_ms_tree_query strengthens period_ms by letting static tree features parti

summary: The period token encoder in the current mainline is a KAN projector with shape 125->32->32 under the agro full-feature setting.
title: Finding: The period token encoder in the current mainline is a KAN projector with shape 1

summary: The tree-query attention is tree-conditioned additive attention driven by period tokens, lag embeddings, static summary, and interaction terms.
title: Finding: The tree-query attention is tree-conditioned additive attention driven by period

summary: The current period_ms versus period_ms_tree_query comparison is confounded by different training settings: period_ms_compare_windows_full5 used lr=0.001, batch_size=32, patience=20, while dynamic_hlb_tree_query_full5 used lr=0.0001, batch_size=128, patience=40, so architecture conclusions should not be based on that pair alone.
title: Finding: The current period_ms versus period_ms_tree_query comparison is confounded by di

summary: Under matched settings closer to period_ms_compare_windows_full5, the tree_query_spatial variant is promising on stable early windows, with 3->2 Ctd about 0.699 and 3->3 Ctd about 0.655, so static spatial structure should be prioritized in the next clean ablation.
title: Finding: Under matched settings closer to period_ms_compare_windows_full5, the tree_query

summary: In the matched non-spatial 5-repeat comparison on 6->1, 6->3, 9->1, 9->3, trigger_orchard_v2 reached mean Ctd about 0.655 versus period_ms_tree_query about 0.489 and original trigger_orchard about 0.436, while mean BStd worsened to about 0.482 versus about 0.296 and about 0.323.
title: Finding: In the matched non-spatial 5-repeat comparison on 6->1, 6->3, 9->1, 9->3, trigge

summary: The extra trigger_orchard_v2 window set 3->6, 3->9, 6->3, 6->6 preserved the strong-ranking / weak-calibration pattern: Ctd stayed competitive on 3->9 and 6->6, but BStd became very unstable on those long horizons.
title: Finding: The extra trigger_orchard_v2 window set 3->6, 3->9, 6->3, 6->6 preserved the str

summary: Validation CT-delta MAE for trigger_orchard_v2 usually stayed around 3.7 to 4.4, which is close to the naive zero-change baseline on the same validation splits, so the current CT auxiliary regression is only a weak supervision signal.
title: Finding: Validation CT-delta MAE for trigger_orchard_v2 usually stayed around 3.7 to 4.4,

summary: Doubling gamma_ct from 0.10 to 0.20 in the matched 5-repeat trigger_orchard_v2 run improved validation CT MAE and cut the unstable 9->3 BStd roughly in half, but it also reduced overall matched-window test Ctd from about 0.655 to about 0.469, with the largest ranking losses on 6->1, 6->3, and 9->1.
title: Finding: Doubling gamma_ct from 0.10 to 0.20 improves calibration but hurts matched-window Ctd

summary: For the trigger_orchard_v2 CT-vector head, gamma_ct=0.5 is dominated by both 0.1 and 1.0: it is worse on overall Ctd, overall BStd, 6->3, and 9->3.
title: Finding: For the trigger_orchard_v2 CT-vector head, gamma_ct=0.5 is dominated by both 0.1

summary: For the trigger_orchard_v2 CT-vector head, gamma_ct=1.0 raises overall mean Ctd from about 0.514 to 0.584 and improves 6->3 and 9->3 Ctd relative to gamma_ct=0.1, but worsens overall mean BStd from about 0.323 to 0.368 and worsens validation CT MAE from about 3.659 to 3.720.
title: Finding: For the trigger_orchard_v2 CT-vector head, gamma_ct=1.0 raises overall mean Ctd

summary: Compared with the older trigger_orchard gamma_ct=0.1 baseline, trigger_orchard_v2 gamma_ct=1.0 has the best overall Ctd, but the older trigger_orchard baseline remains the more balanced reference on 6->3, 9->3, and BStd.
title: Finding: Compared with the older trigger_orchard gamma_ct=0.1 baseline, trigger_orchard_v

summary: In a matched 5-repeat trigger_orchard_v2 gamma_ct=0.1 ablation, replacing the agro-expanded 75-dim daily inputs with raw 9-dim daily inputs reduced mean window Ctd from about 0.655 to about 0.540 and especially hurt 9->1 ranking, while only modestly improving mean BStd from about 0.482 to about 0.414 and validation CT MAE from about 4.02 to about 3.68.
title: Finding: Removing the agro-expanded daily inputs hurts trigger_orchard_v2 ranking more than it helps calibration

summary: AASK is a longitudinal kidney-disease cohort with repeated protocol visits but coarse quarterly/semiannual cadence and request-based access; MIMIC-IV is a rich ICU EHR with dense time-stamped labs/vitals and 1-year mortality endpoints but requires credentialing and heavy preprocessing; PhysioNet/CinC 2019 Sepsis Challenge and HiRID are structurally closer to trigger_orchard_v2 because they already provide per-patient time-series data with sparse event labels at much finer temporal resolution.
title: Finding: Hourly ICU benchmarks fit trigger_orchard_v2 better than AASK

summary: The final tuned workbook hlb_dataset_trigger_orchard_v2_tuned_round2_focus20_14_latefix3.xlsx reached mean Ctd about 0.9083 on one fixed seed3042 repeat over 6->1, 6->3, 9->1, and 9->3, but the untied full 5-repeat rerun on those same four windows dropped to mean Ctd about 0.7549, so single-repeat tuning materially overstates generalization.
title: Finding: The final tuned workbook hlb_dataset_trigger_orchard_v2_tuned_round2_focus20_14_
